_comment: Story-thread data for the /gm/threads branching diagram. The GM's Cowork (which reads the Obsidian vault) generates an updated version of this; paste/hand it over and it gets dropped in here. Schema per beat: id (slug), title, status (open|resolved), session (int), branches_to (list of beat ids), npcs (list), locations (list), summary (one-liner).

beats.title: Arrival in Otari
beats.summary: The party arrives in Otari and meets Romi at the docks.

beats.title: The Missing Shipment
beats.summary: A shipment of supplies never arrived; Romi asks the party to look into it.

beats.title: Trouble at the Fishery
beats.summary: Cleared the creatures nesting beneath the old fishery.

beats.title: The Smuggler Ring
beats.summary: Evidence points to a smuggling ring operating out of the docks.

beats.title: A Guard on the Take
beats.summary: A town guard may be covering for whoever took the shipment.
